---
title: "Manage Your Appointments"
description: "Track, reschedule, or cancel your EpiPulse healthcare appointment. View appointment status and consultation details."
---

# Manage Your Appointments

Track your healthcare appointments with EpiPulse. Check status, reschedule, or get support for your bookings.

## Check Your Appointment Status

To view your appointment details, use one of these methods:

### Method 1: Email Confirmation
- Look for your appointment confirmation email
- Contains all appointment details
- Shows Google Meet link
- Includes appointment ID

### Method 2: SMS Confirmation
- Check SMS sent to your registered phone number
- Contains appointment date, time, and doctor name
- Has Meet link or code

### Method 3: Contact Us
- **Email**: appointments@epipulse.org
- **Phone**: [Your phone number]
- **WhatsApp**: [Your WhatsApp number]
- **Hours**: 9 AM - 6 PM, Monday to Saturday

---

## Your Appointment Information

When you book with us, you'll receive:

```
═══════════════════════════════════
     APPOINTMENT CONFIRMATION
═══════════════════════════════════

Appointment ID: EPP-2024-001234
Patient Name: [Your Name]
Registered Phone: [Your Phone]
Registered Email: [Your Email]

SERVICE DETAILS
Service Type: General OPD
Doctor: Dr. [Doctor Name]
Consultation Fee: ₹200

APPOINTMENT SCHEDULE
Date: [Appointment Date]
Time: [Time Slot]
Duration: 30 minutes
Location: Online (Google Meet)

GOOGLE MEET DETAILS
Meeting Link: https://meet.google.com/xxx-xxxx-xxx
Meeting Code: [Code]
Password: [If required]

BEFORE YOUR APPOINTMENT
- Test your internet connection
- Prepare any medical documents
- Join 5-10 minutes early
- Ensure private, quiet space

IMPORTANT REMINDERS
- Cancellation: Up to 24 hours before
- No-show policy applies
- Digital prescription will be emailed
- Keep this confirmation safe

═══════════════════════════════════
```

---

## Reschedule Your Appointment

### Rescheduling Policy
- ✅ **Can reschedule**: Up to 24 hours before appointment
- ❌ **Cannot reschedule**: Less than 24 hours before appointment
- ⏰ **Notice required**: 24 hours in advance

### How to Reschedule

#### Step 1: Contact Us
Send your request within 24 hours of your appointment:

**Option A: Email**
```
To: appointments@epipulse.org
Subject: Reschedule Appointment - [Your Appointment ID]

Dear EpiPulse Team,
I would like to reschedule my appointment.

Current Appointment:
- Appointment ID: [From your confirmation]
- Date: [Current date]
- Time: [Current time]
- Doctor: [Doctor name]

Preferred New Date: [Your preference]
Preferred New Time: [Your preference]
Reason (Optional): [Why you're rescheduling]

Contact Details:
- Name: [Your name]
- Phone: [Your phone]
- Email: [Your email]

Thank you,
[Your Name]
```

**Option B: Phone/WhatsApp**
- Call: [Your phone number]
- WhatsApp: [Your WhatsApp number]
- Say: "I want to reschedule my appointment" (ID: [Your ID])
- Provide new preferred dates/times

**Option C: Online Form**
[Reschedule Request Form](https://forms.google.com/YOUR_FORM_ID)

#### Step 2: Confirmation
- You'll receive confirmation of new appointment
- New Google Meet link will be sent
- Update calendar with new date/time

---

## Cancel Your Appointment

### Cancellation Policy
- ✅ **Can cancel**: Up to 24 hours before appointment
- ❌ **Cannot cancel**: Less than 24 hours before appointment
- ⚠️ **Repeated cancellations**: May result in booking restrictions

### How to Cancel

#### Step 1: Notify Us
**Email:**
```
To: appointments@epipulse.org
Subject: Cancel Appointment - [Your Appointment ID]

I would like to cancel my appointment.
Appointment ID: [Your ID]
Date: [Appointment date]
Reason (Optional): [Your reason]

Thank you,
[Your Name]
[Your Phone]
```

**Phone/WhatsApp:**
- Call or message: [Your phone number]
- Say: "I want to cancel my appointment"
- Mention your Appointment ID

#### Step 2: Confirmation
- You'll receive cancellation confirmation
- No charge if cancelled within 24 hours
- You can rebook anytime

---

## No-Show Policy

### What is a "No-Show"?
- Booking an appointment but not joining the meeting
- Not informing us of cancellation
- Failure to join within 15 minutes of scheduled time

### No-Show Consequences

**First No-Show:**
- ⚠️ Warning email sent
- Contact to discuss issues
- Opportunity to explain

**Second No-Show:**
- 🚫 Booking privileges suspended for 30 days
- Must contact us to resume booking

**Third No-Show:**
- ⛔ Account may be restricted
- Must speak with management to reinstate

### Avoid No-Shows

- ✅ Mark appointment on your calendar
- ✅ Set reminder 1 day before
- ✅ Set reminder 1 hour before
- ✅ Test internet morning of appointment
- ✅ Complete all preparations before time
- ✅ Notify us 24+ hours in advance if you need to cancel

---

## Appointment Status Explained

### Status Types

**PENDING** 🟡
- Your appointment request received
- Awaiting final confirmation
- We'll contact you within 24 hours
- **Action**: Confirm you can attend

**CONFIRMED** 🟢
- Appointment is confirmed
- You have the Google Meet link
- Doctor is assigned
- **Action**: Prepare and join on time

**IN PROGRESS** 🔵
- Consultation is happening now
- Doctor is online and waiting
- Join the Google Meet meeting
- **Action**: Click the Meet link

**COMPLETED** ✅
- Consultation finished
- Prescription sent via email
- Consultation notes forwarded
- **Action**: Follow medical advice

**CANCELLED** ❌
- Appointment was cancelled
- No charge if cancelled 24hrs before
- You can rebook anytime
- **Action**: Book new appointment

**NO-SHOW** 🚫
- You didn't join the meeting
- Doctor waited but consultation didn't happen
- May affect future bookings
- **Action**: Contact us to explain

---

## Appointment Reminders

### Email Reminders
We send:
- **7 days before**: Appointment reminder with details
- **1 day before**: Final confirmation with Meet link
- **30 minutes before**: Join reminder with link
- **After appointment**: Follow-up with prescription

### SMS Reminders
- **1 day before**: Text with appointment time
- **1 hour before**: Text with Meet link
- **After appointment**: Prescription delivery notification

### Set Your Own Reminders
**Google Calendar:**
1. Add appointment to your calendar
2. Set reminder 1 day before
3. Set reminder 30 minutes before
4. Sync across devices

**Phone Alarm:**
1. Create alarm on day of appointment
2. Set 1 hour before appointment time
3. Set description with Meet link

---

## Track Multiple Appointments

If you have multiple upcoming appointments:

### View All Appointments
- Email: appointments@epipulse.org with subject "View my appointments"
- Phone/WhatsApp: Call and ask for your appointment list
- Include your phone number and email for quick lookup

### Appointment Dashboard (Coming Soon)
- Login to patient portal
- View all past and upcoming appointments
- Download prescriptions and reports
- Message doctors directly

---

## Prescription & Medical Records

### After Your Appointment

**You'll Receive:**
1. **Digital Prescription** (via email)
   - Within 1 hour of consultation
   - Legally valid in India
   - Can be printed or show on phone

2. **Consultation Notes** (via email)
   - Summary of consultation
   - Diagnosis and treatment plan
   - Follow-up instructions

3. **Medical Records** (archived)
   - Stored securely
   - Accessible for future consultations
   - Shareable with other doctors if needed

### Request Medical Records
- Email: records@epipulse.org
- Include your full name and phone number
- Specify which records you need
- Records provided within 24-48 hours

---

## Payment & Billing

### Accepted Payment Methods
- Cash payment at center (if applicable)
- Bank transfer (account details provided)
- Digital payment (UPI - if available)

### Billing Process
1. **Before Appointment**: Fee confirmed (non-refundable if cancelled <24hrs)
2. **After Booking**: Invoice/receipt sent
3. **At Consultation**: Doctor confirms fee in meeting
4. **After Appointment**: Receipt and summary sent

### Refund Policy
- ✅ Full refund if cancelled 24+ hours before
- ❌ No refund if cancelled <24 hours or no-show
- ⏱️ Refund processed within 5-7 business days

---

## Special Situations

### For First-Time Patients
- Need to fill detailed health form
- May take 10-15 minutes extra for orientation
- Book accordingly with extra time

### For Emergency Cases
- **DO NOT** use appointment system
- **Call immediately**: 108 (NDMA Emergency)
- Go to nearest hospital
- Telemedicine is not for emergencies

### For Follow-up Consultations
- Same doctor recommended for continuity
- Can request same doctor during booking
- Previous records reviewed automatically

### For Corporate/Group Bookings
- Bulk appointment discounts available
- Contact: corporate@epipulse.org
- Minimum 10 people required
- Special time slots available

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Can I book multiple appointments at once?**
A: Yes, use the booking form multiple times or contact us for bulk booking.

**Q: Can someone else attend my appointment?**
A: Family can be present, but consultation code is confidential to you.

**Q: What if I'm late to join?**
A: Join within 15 minutes. After that, slot considered no-show.

**Q: Can I reschedule multiple times?**
A: Yes, if done within 24 hours of each appointment.

**Q: What if the doctor doesn't show up?**
A: We'll contact you within 15 minutes to reschedule. No charge.

**Q: Can I get consultation in my language?**
A: Request during booking. Availability depends on doctor.

**Q: Is my health information confidential?**
A: Yes, 100% confidential. Follows medical privacy laws.

**Q: Can I share my appointment link with family?**
A: Not recommended. Your appointment is personal and confidential.

---

## Contact & Support

**Appointment Queries:**
- Email: appointments@epipulse.org
- Phone: [Your phone number]
- WhatsApp: [Your WhatsApp number]
- Hours: 9 AM - 6 PM, Monday to Saturday

**Medical Emergencies:**
- Call 108 (NDMA)
- Go to nearest hospital
- Do not wait for telemedicine appointment

**Feedback & Complaints:**
- Email: feedback@epipulse.org
- We value your feedback
- Complaints addressed within 48 hours

---

## Ready to Book?

[**Book Your Appointment**](book_appointment.qmd)

[**Join Your Consultation**](online_consultations.qmd)

---

**Your appointment management made simple. Your health, our priority.**
